action.reasoning: Observation: worst_region_accuracy improved to 0.479 with region-weighted loss. Africa is still the bottleneck at 0.479 vs other regions at 0.66-0.72. Analysis: Need stronger Africa upweighting and potentially unfreezing more layers. Decision: Modify training to use stronger region weights (especially Africa), unfreeze all vision encoder layers, and train 20 epochs with proper schedule. ~300s/epoch * 20 = 100 min, fits in budget.
